title: Un gând, un vis, Doyle... si-un pix
original_title: Un gând, un vis, Doyle... si-un pix
overview: Constructed almost entirely from still photos masterfully synchronized with audio commentaries, this challenging doc tells the story of an adventurous one-man motorcycle expedition that spans over 21, 000 kilometers and 14 countries.
